Class Environnement

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.cascadia.game.Environnement
public class Environnement extends Object
Represents the game environment for Cascadia.

The environment manages the game board and provides methods to place tiles, animals, and calculate groups and scores for habitats and animals.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    Environnement(int width, int height, boolean isHexagonal)
    Initializes the game board with the specified dimensions.

  • Constructor Details

    • Environnement

      public Environnement(int width, int height, boolean isHexagonal)
      Initializes the game board with the specified dimensions.
      Parameters:
      width - the width of the board
      height - the height of the board

  • Method Details

    • getRowCount

      public int getRowCount()
      Returns the number of rows in the environment.
      Returns:
      the number of rows

    • getColCount

      public int getColCount()
      Returns the number of columns in the environment. Assumes that all rows have the same number of columns.
      Returns:
      the number of columns, or 0 if there are no rows

    • putFirstTile

      public void putFirstTile(Tile[] firstTile)
      Places the first three tiles in the center of the board.
      Parameters:
      firstTile - an array of three tiles to place
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if firstTile is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if firstTile.length is not 3

    • getTile

      public Lot getTile(int x, int y)
      Retrieves the tile or lot at the specified coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the row coordinate
      y - the column coordinate
      Returns:
      the Lot at the specified position or null if empty

    • placementAllowed

      public boolean placementAllowed(int x, int y)
      Checks if a tile can be placed at the specified coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the row coordinate
      y - the column coordinate
      Returns:
      true if placement is allowed; false otherwise

    • ensureCapacity

      public void ensureCapacity(int x, int y)
      Ensures the game board has enough capacity to place a tile at the specified coordinates.
      Parameters:
      x - the row coordinate
      y - the column coordinate

    • placeTile

      public int placeTile(Tile tile, int x, int y)
      Places a tile on the board at the specified coordinates.
      Parameters:
      tile - the tile to place
      x - the row coordinate
      y - the column coordinate
      Returns:
      1 if placement is successful, 0 otherwise
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if tile is null

    • canPlaceAnimal

      public boolean canPlaceAnimal(Animal animal)
      Checks if an animal can be placed on the board.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to check
      Returns:
      true if placement is possible; false otherwise

    • placeAnimal

      public int placeAnimal(Animal animal, int x, int y)
      Places an animal on a tile at the specified coordinates.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to place
      x - the row coordinate
      y - the column coordinate
      Returns:
      1 if placement is successful, 0 otherwise
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if animal is null

    • findAnimalGroups

      public List<List<TileAnimalPair>> findAnimalGroups(Animal animal)
      Finds all groups of TileAnimalPair for a specific animal on the board.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal whose groups are being searched
      Returns:
      a list of groups, where each group is a list of TileAnimalPair
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if animal is null

    • getCoordinates

      public int[] getCoordinates(Lot lotToFind)
      Finds the coordinates of a specific Lot on the board.
      Parameters:
      lotToFind - the lot to locate
      Returns:
      an array of two integers representing the row and column of the lot
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if lotToFind is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the lot is not found on the board

    • isAdjacent

      public boolean isAdjacent(Lot lot1, Lot lot2)
      Checks if two Lot objects are adjacent on the board.
      Parameters:
      lot1 - the first lot
      lot2 - the second lot
      Returns:
      true if the lots are adjacent; false otherwise
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if lot1 or lot2 is null

    • findLargestHabitatGroup

      public int findLargestHabitatGroup(Habitat habitat)
      Finds the largest group of connected tiles with the same habitat.
      Parameters:
      habitat - the habitat type being searched
      Returns:
      the size of the largest habitat group
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if habitat is null

    • getNeighbors

      public List<Lot> getNeighbors(Lot lot)
      Retrieves the neighbors of a given Lot on the board.
      Parameters:
      lot - the lot whose neighbors are being searched
      Returns:
      a list of adjacent lots
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if lot is null

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
